caption: Spring honey in jars. Twelve hives strong off winter. Wildflower this year.
Pulled capped frames before site. Ready to extract this weekend.
Cutting boards from walnut offcuts. Same hands that pull wire all week.
200A panel done in Fox Chase. Clean work. Old fuse box out.
Built a run of deep frames. Cedar, nails, patience.
Quiet board before site. Endgame study.
First warm day. Bees flying, queen laying. Spring's close.
Honey wholesale run to Cedarbrook General. Last of the wildflower.
New hive tool. Stainless. Old one was twenty years gone.
Walnut cutting board, finished. Beeswax and mineral oil.
Wrapped hives for the cold snap. Stores look good.
Site coffee, Moka pot, before the Fishtown job.
Chess club night. Forty members, full room.
Frame jig in the shop. Building for spring.
Snow on the hives. Quiet out back.
Honey labels Katya drew. Linden one's my favorite.
Cold morning service call. Old aluminum branch wiring.
Borscht on the stove. Sunday.
Last market of the season at Briarwood. Honey and boards.
Fall colony inspection. Mites in check.
Turned a few candle holders from cherry. Sold two already.
Knob-and-tube out, new circuit in. Fox Chase row house.
Spring honey in jars. Twelve hives strong off winter. Wildflower this year.
Hive 4 inspection. Queen laying tight pattern. Good sign.
Briarwood market table. Fresh 8oz jars, small chunk comb.
Cutting board finished. Cherry with maple stripe. For Vasyl's kitchen.
Evening walk after dinner. Ferndale in bloom.
Chess night at the club. Blitz round.
Nataliya's tulips came back. Ten years counting.
Bees orienting on a warm afternoon. Watch three minutes.
Panel job before shot. This one is a hazard.
Same panel after. Cleaned, labeled, torqued.
Salo sandwich on the tailgate. Old habit.
Frame joints coming out square. Table saw dialed in.
Briarwood table. Sold out by ten thirty. Bring more jars next week.
Fall Classic replay from October, board 1.
Wisteria blooming. Nectar coming in fast.
Truck packed for Ambler. Rewire day two of four.
First extraction of the season starts next Sunday.
Sunday borscht. From memory, no book.
Grandkid Mila drew a bee. Framed. Above the shop bench.
Bridgeton club board meeting notes. Fall Classic dates set.
Locust in bloom. Bees loud.
Katya sent a new label. Second version. Cleaner.
Memorial Day. Quiet. Coffee and puzzles.
Spring extraction underway. Twelve frames done.
Fresh spring honey. Light amber, cloudy from pollen.
Cedarbrook wholesale pickup this morning.
Diner with Vasyl. Same booth, twenty years.
Ridgemont Co-op stocked with the spring batch.
Late walk. Fireflies again.
Hive inspection - hive 7. Requeening needed.
Doylestown dental group circuits. Two rooms wrapped.
Father's Day. Andriy sent this. Mila's bee drawing round two.
Cutting board number six of ten. Walnut and cherry.
Briarwood. Sold sixteen jars before nine.
Basil in Nataliya's garden. Nine years and I still can't kill it.
EV charger install completed - Roxborough.
Cousin's kolach recipe. First attempt.
Chess study. Karpov endgame collection.
Bees calm. Smoker running easy.
Halyna sent this. Kharkiv sunflowers.
Rewire progress. Two more rooms and we're done.
Coffee with Vasyl this morning. New chess book.
Storm rolled through. Two frames dislodged. Fixed.
August honey pull soon. Prep starting.
Trellis Nataliya built. Still standing.
Sunday borscht. Beets from the yard.
Panel upgrade in Warminster. 200A service.
Late summer extraction begins. Frames capped.
Second harvest bottled. Darker amber than spring.
Briarwood. Last summer market for a while.
Chess Wednesday. Full room again.
Andriy and Mila this weekend. Zoo Sunday.
Panel job wrapping. Client happy.
Pre-op paperwork done. Wynn signed off.
Sept 8 approaching. Truck cleaned out for the week off.
Bees checked. Darren covering next two weeks.
Andriy arrived. Mila too.
Home from Greenleaf. Knee wrapped, ice pack going.
One week post-op. Walker only. Slow.
PT started. Progress slow but real.
Back on the walk today. Half mile. Slow pace.
Fall Classic in one week. Pairings printing.
Cedarbrook stocking fall honey. Second batch.
Fall Classic day one. Board 1 me vs Kaminski.
Truck back on the road. Cleared by Ramos.
Panel job resumes. Cavanaugh basement.
Chess night. Full room. Missed it.
Cutting boards to Foxpoint for Katya's coworkers.
October board meeting notes wrapped.
Katya's birthday. Called at seven.
Hives wrapped for winter. Mouse guards on.
Cousin's kolach improved. Katya approves.
Kellys gathering for Thanksgiving. Grocery run.
Mila turns five today. Baltimore this weekend.
Thanksgiving. Andriy, Mila, Katya, Vasyl and Irina.
Frame drying rack full again. Winter build.
Snow started. Bees clustered tight.
Halyna's birthday. Two hour video call.
Christmas order run. Last honey box out.
Quiet Christmas. Called Halyna. Called Andriy.
Year-end books ready for Steve.
Chess is back to Wednesdays. Roman running warmups.
Vasyl's birthday. Diner. Same booth.
